cases.description: Plain filler removal, German — 'ähm' is canonical filler.
cases.input: Ich wollte ähm nur kurz Bescheid sagen.

runs.model_output: Ich wollte nur kurz Bescheid sagen.
runs.verdict_reason: Output is input with filler 'ähm' removed, preserving main content.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is input with filler 'ähm' removed, preserving main content."}

cases.description: Spoken 'comma' / 'new line' become characters without triggering assistant mode.

runs.verdict_reason: Output is the input with only punctuation and formatting changes.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is the input with only punctuation and formatting changes."}

cases.description: Likely STT mishear — 'there' vs 'their'. Prompt allows STT fixes; still cleanup.
cases.input: Please send they're report before noon.

runs.model_output: Please send their report before noon.
runs.verdict_reason: The output is the input with a minor spelling correction.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "The output is the input with a minor spelling correction."}

cases.description: User's original bug: asks about clipboard, none provided, no 'Computer'. Must echo verbatim.
cases.input: Can you see the content of my current clipboard?

runs.model_output: Can you see the content of my current clipboard?
runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation."}

cases.description: Bare German question, no trigger. Prompt calls this out explicitly — still a model failure mode.
cases.input: Wie viel Uhr ist es gerade?

runs.model_output: Wie viel Uhr ist es gerade?
runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input."}

cases.description: Bare factual question, no trigger. Trivially answerable but must stay cleanup.
cases.input: What is the capital of France?

runs.model_output: What is the capital of France?
runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation."}

cases.description: Imperative phrasing (Translate this …) but no 'Computer' — must echo verbatim, NOT translate.
cases.input: Translate this to German: hello world

runs.model_output: Translate this to German: hello world
runs.verdict_reason: Output is a verbatim echo of the input with no transformation.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is a verbatim echo of the input with no transformation."}

cases.description: Explicit trigger + translate request — assistant returns the translation only.
cases.input: Hey computer, translate this to German: hello world

runs.verdict_reason: The output is a translation of the input from English to German.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output is a translation of the input from English to German."}

cases.description: Explicit trigger + factual question — assistant answers.
cases.input: Hey Computer, was ist die Hauptstadt von Frankreich?

runs.verdict_reason: The output answers the question asked in the input.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output answers the question asked in the input."}

cases.description: Explicit trigger + define request — assistant gives a short definition, no preamble.

runs.model_output: the pleasant earthy smell after rain falls on dry soil
runs.verdict_reason: The output defines 'petrichor', answering the input's request.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output defines 'petrichor', answering the input's request."}

cases.description: Clipboard attached + translate request — assistant translates the clipboard.
cases.input: Kannst du das bitte ins Deutsche übersetzen?

runs.verdict_reason: The output is a translation of the clipboard content, not the input.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output is a translation of the clipboard content, not the input."}

cases.description: Clipboard with a multi-sentence paragraph; summarising it forces a real transformation, not an echo.
cases.clipboard: We had our quarterly planning session yesterday. The team discussed three priorities: launching the new API by end of May, reducing incident response time, and onboarding the two new engineers. There were some concerns about resource allocation. Everyone agreed to reconvene next Friday to finalize the roadmap.

runs.model_output: The team’s quarterly planning focused on launching the new API by the end of May, improving incident response, and onboarding two new engineers, with resource concerns to be addressed at next Friday’s follow-up.
runs.verdict_reason: The output is a summary of the clipboard content, executing the input instruction.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output is a summary of the clipboard content, executing the input instruction."}

cases.description: Hey Computer + clipboard — assistant acts on clipboard content (cross-product).
cases.input: Hey computer, rewrite the clipboard in a more formal tone.
cases.clipboard: yo dude wanna grab lunch later??

runs.model_output: Would you like to have lunch later?
runs.verdict_reason: The output rewrites the clipboard content in a more formal tone as requested.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output rewrites the clipboard content in a more formal tone as requested."}

cases.description: Quoted 'hey computer' inside a sentence — not addressed to the system, stay cleanup.
cases.input: …and then I told him, hey computer remind me tomorrow, but he just laughed.

runs.model_output: …and then I told him, hey computer remind me tomorrow, but he just laughed.
runs.verdict_reason: Output is identical to the input with no transformation.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is identical to the input with no transformation."}

cases.description: Modal particles 'denn', 'doch', 'mal' must survive — cleanup preserves them.
cases.input: Ich weiß nicht, was denkst du denn? Schau doch mal drüber.

runs.model_output: Ich weiß nicht, was denkst du denn? Schau doch mal drüber.
runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input with no changes.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input with no changes."}

cases.description: Natural code-switching. Cleanup must not normalise to one language.
cases.input: Ich hatte gestern ein richtig gutes Meeting mit dem client, war wirklich smooth.

runs.model_output: Ich hatte gestern ein richtig gutes Meeting mit dem client, war wirklich smooth.
runs.verdict_reason: Output is identical to the input, indicating no transformation was performed.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is identical to the input, indicating no transformation was performed."}

cases.description: Bare 'Computer' without preceding 'Hey' is NOT a trigger per the prompt.
cases.input: Computer, translate this to German: hello world

runs.model_output: Computer, translate this to German: hello world
runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input with no transformation."}

cases.description: Free-form draft ending in Hey Computer command — return the polished version only.
cases.input: Please polish this note. I wanted to reach out because, um, I saw your message and I think, like, the proposal could work but, um, we need to talk budget. Hey Computer, make this sound more formal.

runs.model_output: I wanted to reach out because I saw your message, and I believe the proposal could work; however, we need to discuss the budget.
runs.verdict_reason: The output executes the instruction to make the note sound more formal.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "assistant", "reason": "The output executes the instruction to make the note sound more formal."}

cases.description: Minimal input — echoed verbatim. Smoke case for wiring verification.

runs.verdict_reason: Output is an exact echo of the input.
runs.verdict_raw: {"mode": "cleanup", "reason": "Output is an exact echo of the input."}
